name: Olivet Baptist
description_short: Olivet Baptist Church in Westwood, Kansas offers faith-based community services including online worship, ministries, and spiritual guidance through their church website.
description_long: Olivet Baptist Church is a religious congregation located in Westwood, Kansas, serving the local community with Christian worship and spiritual development. The church operates from its primary location at 4901 Mission Road and maintains an online presence to extend services to members and visitors who cannot attend in person. The organization functions as a faith-based non-profit institution rather than a financial services provider. The church offers comprehensive spiritual and community programming including online services accessible via YouTube, prayer request submission, various ministry programs for different age groups, a Christian school partnership, and opportunities for community service. The church distinguishes itself through its multi-generational approach, offering tailored ministries for adults, children, youth, college students, and career professionals, along with music ministry and concert series. Additionally, Olivet Baptist operates Shawnee Mission Christian School and maintains active missions programs. However, Olivet Baptist Church does not provide consumer financial services, credit products, loans, or any payday alternatives. The church was incorrectly categorized as a payday-alternative lender when it is exclusively a religious institution offering spiritual services and community programs. Consumers seeking actual financial assistance or loans should not contact this organization, as it operates solely as a place of worship and does not offer financial products or emergency lending services.
services: Prayer request submission and spiritual counseling
Partnership with Shawnee Mission Christian School
pros: Offers free online services via YouTube, making worship accessible to those unable to attend in-person
Provides free prayer request submission service for spiritual support
Multiple ministry programs available at no cost for different age groups and life stages
Free community service opportunities for those interested in volunteering
Operates an affiliated Christian school providing educational services to the community
Maintains active missions programs supporting charitable causes
Clear contact information and accessible physical location for community members
cons: Does not offer any financial services, loans, or emergency cash assistance
Website categorization as payday-alternative is completely inaccurate and misleading
No consumer finance products or credit-related services available
Not appropriate for anyone seeking actual financial assistance or lending services
404 error encountered on online services page indicates some website functionality issues
best_for: Community members seeking spiritual guidance and worship services
Families interested in faith-based children and youth programs
Individuals looking for volunteer and community service opportunities
diagnosis: Olivet Baptist Church is a religious institution providing spiritual services and community programs, not a financial services company. Any consumer seeking payday alternatives, emergency loans, or credit products should not contact this organization, as it offers no financial services whatsoever and was miscategorized in the CreditDoc database.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
